prose:
**Fukui Reactivity Indices for Furan**

Fukui reactivity indices for furan were computed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the tier `standard` level of theory (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) with the PySCF program. The calculation was performed in the **gas phase** with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The geometry was sourced from the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` file and was used as a fixed geometry (single point calculation). Partial charges were calculated using the Mulliken scheme.

**Fukui Indices per Atom (f+, f-, f0, Dual Descriptor):**

| Atom Index (0-based) | Symbol | f+ (Electrophilic Attack) | f- (Nucleophilic Attack) | f0 (Radical Attack) | Dual Descriptor (f- - f+) |
| :------------------- | :----- | :------------------------ | :----------------------- | :------------------ | :------------------------ |
| 0                    | O      | -1.3316182                | 0.08382155               | -0.62389834         | -1.4154398                |
| 1                    | C      | 1.2286866                 | 0.089103093              | 0.65889484          | -1.1395835                |
| 2                    | C      | 1.2270264                 | 0.089304821              | 0.65816562          | -1.1377216                |
| 3                    | C      | 1.9233053                 | 0.161527                 | 1.0424161           | -1.7617783                |
| 4                    | C      | 1.9242931                 | 0.1616371                | 1.0429651           | -1.762656                 |
| 5                    | H      | -1.2190639                | 0.10248412               | -0.55828991         | -1.3215481                |
| 6                    | H      | -1.2191055                | 0.1025135                | -0.55829603         | -1.321619                 |
| 7                    | H      | -0.76678308               | 0.10481615               | -0.33098346         | -0.87159923               |
| 8                    | H      | -0.76674059               | 0.10479266               | -0.33097397         | -0.87153325               |

**Most Electrophilic Site:** Atom 4 (Carbon), with an f+ value of 1.9242931.
**Most Nucleophilic Site:** Atom 4 (Carbon), with an f- value of 0.1616371.

**Warnings:**
*   sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
*   sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

The calculation integrity was verified as trustworthy. A plot of the Fukui indices was generated and saved to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/argo_gemini-2.5-flash/20260703-193120_furan_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.
